description_long: This is a modern tactical axe with a sleek, all-black finish, featuring a single-piece construction that integrates both the handle and the blade. The blade has a pronounced, sharply pointed tip on one end and a wide, curved cutting edge on the other, with three circular holes near the top for weight reduction or aesthetic appeal. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and textured for grip, with a subtle midsection ridge that may enhance handling. The axe head is relatively thin, with a streamlined profile that suggests it is designed for both chopping and piercing. The overall design is minimalist and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. Its robust, metallic appearance indicates it is built for durability and heavy-duty use in urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A sleek, all-black tactical axe with a curved blade, pointed tip, and a textured straight handle. The design is minimalist and robust, suitable for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the side, showing the full profile of the curved blade, pointed tip, and three circular holes near the blade's top.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed edge-on, revealing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail except the straight, narrow profile.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile of the axe, mirroring view 0, with the curved blade, pointed tip, and three holes visible.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, showing the straight, narrow silhouette of the axe.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle with a textured, grippy surface, likely made of polymer or coated steel, no visible curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Curved, single-edged blade with a sharply pointed tip, three circular holes near the top, and a thin, streamlined profile.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, single-piece or molded construction with the blade and handle integrated.
